assertions.title: Rotate Keyset intake renders with disabled Validate & Continue CTA
assertions.reason: All required intake sections, source-share rows, progress/help copy, configuration steppers, info banner, and disabled CTA state rendered as specified.

steps.action: Navigate to /demo/rotate-keyset-intake and wait for networkidle
steps.expected: Rotate keyset intake screen renders with rotate stepper and source-share content
steps.observed: Rendered at /demo/rotate-keyset-intake with step labels Rotate Keyset / Create Profile / Distribute Shares and all specified source-share fields.

steps.expected: "Validate & Continue" is disabled with muted visual
steps.observed: Snapshot marked button disabled; computed styles: color rgba(255,255,255,0.4), background rgba(37,99,235,0.25).

assertions.title: Rotate Keyset Review & Generate renders warning + password pair + destructive CTA
assertions.reason: Review screen showed required irreversible-step copy, amber warning panel text, password/confirm inputs, and red destructive primary CTA.

steps.action: Navigate to /demo/rotate-keyset-review-generate and wait for networkidle
steps.expected: Review & Generate screen with warning copy and distribution password section
steps.observed: Page rendered with expected heading/description, warning panel title/body, and password + confirm-password inputs.

steps.expected: "Rotate & Generate Keyset" uses destructive red styling
steps.observed: Computed button background rgb(220, 38, 38) with white text.

assertions.title: Rotate Keyset Generation Progress renders 4 phases with outlined active ring
assertions.reason: Generation progress screen rendered all four required phases, 2-of-4 progress row, active outlined indicator with inner square, and pending outlined indicator without inner element.

steps.action: Navigate to /demo/rotate-keyset-generation-progress and read page text
steps.expected: Four phases in order with overall progress "2 of 4 phases"
steps.observed: Phase labels and statuses matched: Process Source Shares (Done), Recover Existing Key (Done), Generate Fresh Shares (Processing...), Prepare Rotated Shares; progress shows "2 of 4 phases".

steps.expected: Active marker is outlined blue ring with inner square; pending marker is outlined with no inner marker
steps.observed: Active marker computed border is 2px blue and ::after pseudo-element is 8x8 with rgb(96,165,250); pending marker is outlined and has no ::after content.

assertions.title: Rotate-keyset adaptation scenarios exist in demoScenarios
assertions.reason: All three required rotate-keyset adaptation scenarios are registered with expected IDs/pathnames and load correctly in DemoGallery with rotate-keyset stepper variant (no redirect to /).

steps.expected: demoScenarios includes rotate-keyset-create-profile/distribute/complete with pathnames /rotate-keyset/profile, /rotate-keyset/distribute, /rotate-keyset/complete and canonical not false
steps.observed: Found all 3 entries with matching IDs/pathnames; scenario() default sets canonical: options.canonical ?? true, and these entries do not override canonical to false.

steps.expected: Scenario page loads without redirect and shows rotate-keyset stepper variant
steps.observed: URL remained /demo/rotate-keyset-create-profile; stepper text shows Rotate Keyset / Create Profile / Distribute Shares.

steps.expected: Scenario page loads without redirect and shows rotate-keyset stepper variant
steps.observed: URL remained /demo/rotate-keyset-distribute; stepper text shows rotate-keyset variant with step 3 active.

steps.expected: Scenario page loads without redirect and shows rotate-keyset stepper variant
steps.observed: URL remained /demo/rotate-keyset-complete; rotate-keyset stepper labels present with completion screen content.

grep: src/demo/scenarios.ts:72 canonical default is options.canonical ?? true

summary: Tested 4 assertions (VAL-RTK-001, VAL-RTK-002, VAL-RTK-003, VAL-RTK-010): 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
